CREATE TABLE test_table (left Int32, right Int32);
SELECT left, right, multiIf(left < right, 'left is smaller', left > right, 'left is greater', left = right, 'Both equal', 'Null value') AS result FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE nested_table (id Int32, value Int32);
SELECT id, value, multiIf(value IS NULL, 'Value is NULL', value < 15, 'Low', value >= 15 AND value < 25, 'Medium', value >= 25, 'High') AS value_category FROM nested_table;
CREATE TABLE second_test_table (id Int32, number Int32);
SELECT id, multiIf(number = 0, 'Zero Division', number = 2, intDiv(10, number), number = 4, intDiv(20, number), 'Not matched') AS division_result FROM second_test_table;
SELECT multiIf(left < right, 'A', left > right, 'B', left = right, 'C') AS comparison FROM (SELECT 2 AS left, 3 AS right UNION ALL SELECT 3, 2 UNION ALL SELECT 2, 2) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE join_table_1 (id Int32, status String);
CREATE TABLE join_table_2 (id Int32, description String);

SELECT j1.id, j1.status, multiIf(j1.status = 'active', 'In Progress', j1.status = 'inactive', 'Paused', 'Unknown') AS task_status, j2.description FROM join_table_1 AS j1 JOIN join_table_2 AS j2 ON j1.id = j2.id;

SELECT multiIf(left IS NULL OR right IS NULL, 'Invalid Comparison', left < right, 'Left Smaller', left > right, 'Left Greater', left = right, 'Equal') AS comparison_result FROM (SELECT NULL AS left, 2 AS right UNION ALL SELECT 4, NULL UNION ALL SELECT 5, 5) AS comparison_data;
